keys.meta_description: Workflow-first platform for HR, finance, and operations—one canvas for Attendance, Leave, Expense, eInvoice, Approval, Automation, and Scheduler.
keys.hero_title: One OS for how work moves
keys.features_0_description: Attendance and leave on shared approval paths.
keys.features_1_description: Expense, eInvoice, and posting in one trail.
keys.features_2_description: Automation handles recurring runs in context.
keys.sections_1_body: Vouus maps triggers, tasks, and approvals on one record.
keys.sections_2_body: Scheduler executes repeatable slices with human gates where needed.
keys.sections_3_body: Cleaner books and fewer copy-paste cycles.
keys.faq_0_q: What is the Vouus product overview?
keys.faq_0_a: The platform unifies HR, finance, and operations on one workflow spine—so approvals, automation, and data move together instead of stalling in hand-offs.
keys.faq_1_q: Which modules are included in the platform?
keys.faq_1_a: Core modules are Attendance, Leave, Expense, eInvoice, Approval, Business Intelligence, CRM, and Workflow Builder. All run on the same approval and automation layer.
keys.faq_2_q: How quickly can a team go live?
keys.faq_2_a: Standard deployment for a 10–20 person team is typically completed within two weeks, including data migration and workflow configuration.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
